parsed.availability_comment: Recent reports agree he is rehabbing after the World Cup injury; no clear official KKR/SLC clearance found for match one, so availability for the first four fixtures is downgraded.
parsed.availability_note: Injury during the T20 World Cup on 2026-02-16 is confirmed, but latest pre-IPL status remains unresolved in public reporting.
parsed.followup_reason: Need official fitness/NOC confirmation and whether he is available from IPL 2026 match one or only after the opening games.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Would normally lead the death-bowling overseas mix, but fitness doubt and alternative overseas combinations reduce lock status.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Strong role case when fit, but KKR have multiple overseas bowling and all-round options and added Blessing Muzarabani on the squad list.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: First-choice death option if cleared, but early-match selection is uncertain due to rehab and KKR's other overseas pace cover.

- Keep comments short and audit-friendly.
- If evidence remains conflicting, say so explicitly and keep needs_player_followup=true.
